title: 10 best herbal teas for dry nose
description: Melissa officinalis, also known as lemon balm, teas helps with dry nose because it possesses anti-inflammatory and antihistamine properties that soothe and calm the nasal passages. The tea's cooling effect helps to reduce nasal congestion and ease dryness, promoting a healthy mucous membrane. Additionally, its natural decongestant properties help to clear out mucus and debris, allowing for unobstructed breathing. By providing relief from dry nose symptoms, Melissa officinalis tea helps...
